title: Nami’s Room Is Revealed
description: On pages 1–4, nami’s room is revealed focuses on Luffy, Arlong, Nami, Nojiko as luffy discovers the room where Nami was forced to draw maps and turns his anger on Arlong Park itself.
scene: On pages 1–4, nami’s room is revealed focuses on Luffy, Arlong, Nami, Nojiko as luffy discovers the room where Nami was forced to draw maps and turns his anger on Arlong Park itself.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: My Kiribachi...!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Just what exactly,

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Do you think she is...?

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: She's a brilliant cartographer. Of course, she is still a member of your inferior race,

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: But she's got a good head on her shoulders. If I were to liker you humans to filthy rats,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Then she'd be a cheeky little cat...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: In any case, she's a cute lil' thing.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I'll have her continue drawing maps for me in this room. For forever, that is.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I'll feed her,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: And even buy her any clothes she wants! That girl will never be in want for as long as she lives.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: In return, all she has to do is draw maps for me.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Because you see,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We're crew- mates.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Damn it...! Just what exactly happened to brother Luffy!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: We've got no way of knowing what's going on up there!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: WAHA...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Ahhh!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: A desk...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Whew...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: It's just a desk...

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: that scared me good. For a second, I almost thought it was brother Lu...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Hey! Are you saying you don't believe in Brother Luffy's strength!?

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Hey, you were scared too, Johnny!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Wha... no, umm... I uhh, thought it might be along...

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Ah...

summary: This part pushes the Arlong Park battle forward, clarifying who is fighting, what is at stake, and why Nami’s freedom matters.
